# Primary sources

These sources are version-sensitive. Revalidate them against the deployed tool, client, or
database version before relying on version-specific guidance.

- Python argparse: https://docs.python.org/3/library/argparse.html
- Python exceptions: https://docs.python.org/3/library/exceptions.html
- Python sys: https://docs.python.org/3/library/sys.html
- Python subprocess: https://docs.python.org/3/library/subprocess.html
- Click exception handling: https://click.palletsprojects.com/en/stable/exceptions/
